nonGoals: Do NOT fix KNOWN_TAGS case-sensitivity in validate.ts
Do NOT change serialize.ts or validate.ts
Do NOT normalize tag names stored in SSML_TAGS array itself
Do NOT add case-insensitive handling beyond getTagDef lookup
objective: Make getTagDef() case-insensitive by lowercasing the lookup argument, and add test coverage for uppercase, mixed-case, lowercase, unknown-tag, and isTagSupportedByProvider parity.
planText:
1. In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, change getTagDef() line from `t.tag === tagName` to `t.tag === tagName.toLowerCase()`.
2. In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts, add test cases:
   - getTagDef('PROSODY') returns prosody definition
   - getTagDef('Break') returns break definition
   - getTagDef('emphasis') returns emphasis definition (lowercase still works)
   - getTagDef('nonexistent') returns undefined
   - isTagSupportedByProvider('PROSODY', provider) equals isTagSupportedByProvider('prosody', provider)
3. Run npm run test — all existing and new tests must pass.
